task_statement: P4b repair/replay after P4a link_paused. Recreate and close the P4 AgentFact pre-persistence implementation: chat-session submit intake rejects AgentFact-forbidden top-level authority keys before submission.json persistence; nested ordinary status/result evidence remains legal; poisoned submission cannot create write-exclusive wedge. Distinguish P4 done-condition evidence from broader evidence-projection/template-ref gaps. If the P4 done condition and focused/all checker evidence are observed, closure must not return Link-facing concern solely because raw/agent-return.jsonl or claim_trace template refs are absent from this Building root; record those under not_proven/deferred review instead.
selection_rule: manual repair/replay graph because prior official P4a reached implementation but paused on evidence-template/log gaps without sandbox commit; this graph targets replayable implementation plus sufficiency separation.

nodes.work_statement:
P4b repair/replay work. Start from live HEAD 0354a8f plus prior evidence root `/Users/smith/.brick/project/brick-protocol/buildings/brick-6-p4-agentfact-pre-persistence-0701a` as support evidence only. Recreate the P4 implementation narrowly: in support/operator/run_chat_session.py, validate returned payload through existing AgentFact construction before submission.json is written; preserve recursive secret/session validation but DO NOT recursively ban top-level verdict words inside nested evidence. Extend focused checker coverage in support/checkers/lib/kernel_checks.py and lifecycle checker if needed: top-level returned.status/result/success/movement/target/verdict rejects before any submission.json write; nested returned.observed_evidence[].status and returned.evidence.result accepted; poisoned submission wedge prevented. Run py_compile changed files, focused building_automation profile, direct probe if useful, git diff --check, and check_profile.py --all. Return exact changed_files, command rc outcomes, and not_proven. If --all fails only outside P4, classify the out-of-scope profile; do not hide it.

STRICT SCOPE: phase:P4 repair/replay only. Use paused 0701a evidence as support evidence, not source truth. Do not broaden into P5-P8, P3 return-shape carry, release/dashboard/provider/pytest honesty, raw scrub, or post-HOLD resume isolation beyond the poisoned chat-session submission wedge named by P4. Do not push. Do not use ai-cli MCP, ai-cli-backed helpers, or native subagents. Do not store or print secrets/session bodies. Movement vocabulary is forward/reroute only; HOLD is lifecycle. QA lanes may inspect and run probe_write fixtures only; they must not source-mutate customer files. Checker/profile green is support evidence only.
